title: Recall Difference Identity for Sine
text: Recall the difference identity for sine: $$\sin(A-B)$$ $$=$$ $$sinAcosB$$ $$-$$ $$cosAsinB$$

title: Apply the identity
text: Substitute the identity into the numerator of the left side of the expression.

title: Simplify using $$tantheta$$ $$=$$ \frac{sin\theta}{cos\theta}$$
text: Separate the fraction and simplify each term using the definition of tangent.
